name: Model Card Refresh
description: Refresh a model card with current intended use, limitations, datasets, metrics, and evidence-backed caveats.

inputs.description: Model identifier, local checkpoint, or model card URL.
Optional evaluation results file, report, or benchmark reference.
Dataset identifier or card URL used for training or evaluation.

permissions.description: Read model card, dataset card, evaluation summaries, repository metadata, and license information.

approval_points.description: Confirm model card changes, unresolved evidence gaps, and caveats.
Publish model card updates outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Card Intake
phases.objective: Capture model identity, license, intended use, base model or training lineage, and current card sections.

phases.name: Evidence Review
phases.objective: Review datasets, evaluation results, metrics, limitations, and missing evidence for card claims.

phases.name: Refresh Plan
phases.objective: Draft updated card sections for intended use, limitations, training data, metrics, and caveats.

phases.name: Publication Review
phases.objective: Prepare final patch notes, unresolved gaps, and publication decision with evidence links.

required_outputs.description: Model identity, purpose, license, lineage, and card refresh scope.
Card claims mapped to datasets, metrics, eval reports, or missing evidence.
Documented evaluation metrics with splits, datasets, and result sources.
Updated model card sections or patch-ready README content.
Refresh summary, caveats, unresolved gaps, and publication decision notes.

artifacts.description: Proposed model card changes and rationale.
README.md model card draft with metadata.

verifiers.description: Model identity, intended use, license, and compatibility context are documented.
Training or evaluation dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded when available.
Evaluation metrics include task, dataset or split, value, and source reference.
Model card includes intended use, limitations, datasets, training parameters, and evaluation results.
Final card claims cite metric summary, evidence table, dataset metadata, or explicit gaps.
